---
title: "DeepLearning Widget Helpers"
---

## Overview

The `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/` directory contains reusable utility classes
extracted from the monolithic `DeepLearningPropertiesWidget` during the widget
refactoring (helper extraction and schema-driven sub-panels).

## DataSourceComboHelper

**Header:** `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/DataSourceComboHelper.hpp`

Centralises QComboBox population and auto-refresh for DataManager-aware combo
boxes. Replaces the hand-written `_populateDataSourceCombo` /
`_refreshDataSourceCombos` methods that were previously inlined in the properties
widget.

### Key features

- **One-shot population** via `populateCombo(combo, types)` — clears the combo,
  adds a `(None)` sentinel, then appends all DataManager keys matching the
  requested `DM_DataType` filter. Preserves the user's current selection if it
  is still valid after repopulation.
- **Tracking** via `track(combo, types)` / `untrack(combo)` — registers a combo
  for batch refresh when `refreshAll()` is called (typically from a DataManager
  observer callback). Tracked combos auto-untrack on `QObject::destroyed` to
  avoid dangling pointers.
- **Type hint conversion** via the static `typesFromHint(string)` — translates
  `SlotAssembler` type-hint strings (e.g. `"PointData"`, `"MediaData"`) to a
  `std::vector<DM_DataType>` suitable for the filter parameter.

### Typical usage

```cpp
auto helper = std::make_unique<DataSourceComboHelper>(data_manager, this);

// One-shot
helper->populateCombo(my_combo, DM_DataType::Points);

// Track for auto-refresh
helper->track(my_combo, "PointData");
dm->addObserver([&]{ helper->refreshAll(); });
```

## SlotBindingWidget

**Header:** `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/SlotBindingWidget.hpp`

A composite widget that pairs a DataManager-aware data-source combo (driven by
`DataSourceComboHelper`) with an `AutoParamWidget` for the remaining parameter
fields. This implements **Option C** from the refactoring roadmap (Phase 0.2).

### Layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────┐
│  [Data Source label] [combo] │  ← DataSourceComboHelper-managed
├──────────────────────────────┤
│  AutoParamWidget form        │  ← schema-driven from ParameterSchema
└──────────────────────────────┘
```

### Signals

| Signal | Emitted when |
|---|---|
| `dataSourceChanged(QString)` | User selects a different data source key |
| `parametersChanged()` | Any AutoParamWidget field changes |
| `bindingChanged()` | Either of the above (unified convenience signal) |

### Typical usage

```cpp
auto* slot = new SlotBindingWidget(combo_helper, this);
slot->setDataSourceTypes("PointData");
slot->setParameterSchema(extractParameterSchema<Point2DEncoderParams>());

connect(slot, &SlotBindingWidget::bindingChanged, this, &MyWidget::onChanged);

// Read back
QString key = slot->selectedDataSource();
nlohmann::json params = slot->parametersJson();
```

::: {.callout-warning}
`SlotBindingWidget` is **deprecated** as of Phase 0.2 revision.
Phase 1 sub-widgets use the unified struct approach via `DynamicInputSlotWidget`
and `AutoParamWidget::updateAllowedValues()` instead.
:::

## DynamicInputSlotWidget

**Header:** `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/DynamicInputSlotWidget.hpp`

A self-contained widget for configuring one dynamic (per-frame) input slot.
Introduced in Phase 1.1 of the refactoring roadmap, it replaces the hand-built
`_buildDynamicInputGroup()` panel with a schema-driven form powered by
`AutoParamWidget`.

### Architecture

The widget is driven by the `DynamicInputSlotParams` reflect-cpp struct:

```cpp
using EncoderVariant = rfl::TaggedUnion<
    "encoder",
    dl::ImageEncoderParams,
    dl::Point2DEncoderParams,
    dl::Mask2DEncoderParams,
    dl::Line2DEncoderParams>;

struct DynamicInputSlotParams {
    std::string source;       ///< DataManager key (dynamic combo)
    EncoderVariant encoder;   ///< Encoder type + per-encoder params
    int time_offset = 0;      ///< Temporal offset from current frame
};
```

AutoParamWidget automatically generates:

- **`source`** → QComboBox (dynamic, populated from DataManager via `updateAllowedValues`)
- **`encoder`** → QComboBox (Image/Point2D/Mask2D/Line2D) + QStackedWidget with
  per-encoder sub-parameter forms (mode, gaussian_sigma, normalize)
- **`time_offset`** → QSpinBox

### Cross-field constraints

When the encoder selection changes, the widget uses
`SlotAssembler::dataTypeForEncoder()` and `DataSourceComboHelper::typesFromHint()`
to filter the source combo to only show compatible DataManager keys. This is
the **Encoder → Source** constraint direction.

### Typical usage

```cpp
// In the coordinator widget (DeepLearningPropertiesWidget or its replacement)
auto* slot_widget = new DynamicInputSlotWidget(slot_descriptor, data_manager, this);
layout->addWidget(slot_widget);

// Respond to binding changes
connect(slot_widget, &DynamicInputSlotWidget::bindingChanged, this, [&]() {
    auto params = slot_widget->params();
    // Update state...
});

// Refresh data sources when DataManager changes
dm_observer_callback = [slot_widget]() {
    slot_widget->refreshDataSources();
};
```

### Advantages over the old design

| Aspect | Old (`_buildDynamicInputGroup`) | New (`DynamicInputSlotWidget`) |
|---|---|---|
| Form construction | ~90 lines of manual widget creation | Auto-generated from `ParameterSchema` |
| State marshaling | `findChild<QComboBox*>("source_" + name)` | `params()` returns typed struct |
| Encoder sub-params | Flat mode + sigma fields for all encoders | Per-encoder stacked forms |
| JSON round-trip | Manual field-by-field extraction | `rfl::json::write/read` on the struct |
| Testing | Requires full widget + DM integration | Struct tests are Qt-free |

## PostEncoderWidget {#postencoderwidget}

**Header:** `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/PostEncoderWidget.hpp`

A self-contained widget for configuring the post-encoder module section. Introduced
in the DeepLearning widget refactoring, it replaces the hand-built
`_buildPostEncoderSection()` panel with a schema-driven `AutoParamWidget` form.

### Architecture

The widget is driven by `PostEncoderSlotParams` (`module_key` + `parameters_json`):

```cpp
struct PostEncoderStepDescriptor {
    std::string module_key = "none";
    std::string parameters_json = "{}";
};
using PostEncoderSlotParams = PostEncoderStepDescriptor;
```

UI structure:

- **Module combo** — from `PostEncoderModuleRegistry::moduleKeys()` + `(None)`
- **Parameter panel** — `AutoParamWidget` with schema from `getSchema(module_key)`
- **`point_key`** — dynamic combo when `spatial_point` is selected

UI hints for `SpatialPointModuleParams` live in
`DeepLearning/post_encoder/PostEncoderParamSchemas.hpp`.

### Signals

| Signal | Emitted when |
|---|---|
| `bindingChanged()` | Any parameter change (after state and assembler are updated) |

### Typical usage

```cpp
auto * post_encoder = new PostEncoderWidget(state, dm, assembler, this);
layout->addWidget(post_encoder);

connect(post_encoder, &PostEncoderWidget::bindingChanged, this, [&]() {
    // Coordinator reacts to module or point_key changes
});

// Refresh when DataManager keys change
dm_observer_callback = [post_encoder]() {
    post_encoder->refreshDataSources();
};
```

### State and apply path

- **Read:** `params()` returns `PostEncoderSlotParams` via `toJson()` →
  `rfl::json::read`.
- **Write:** `setParams(p)` serializes with `rfl::json::write` → `fromJson`.
- **Persist:** `DeepLearningState::postEncoderParams()` is the workspace source
  of truth (embedded in `DeepLearningStateData` via reflect-cpp).
- **Apply:** `_applyToStateAndAssembler()` calls `setPostEncoderParams()`, then
  `SlotAssembler::configurePostEncoderModule(params, ...)` when the model is ready.
- **Re-sync:** `syncToAssembler()` re-applies params after `loadModel()` clears the
  assembler module (called from `_loadModelIfReady()` and
  `_enforcePostEncoderDecoderConsistency()`).

### Comparison with TransformsV2_Widget

`PostEncoderWidget` is the **simple** schema-driven pattern (one fixed struct, one
form). For runtime catalogs, ordered multi-step composition, and JSON-as-state,
see [Schema-Driven Forms](../ui/schema_driven_forms.qmd), which documents how
TransformsV2_Widget extends the same primitives and proposes phased improvements
for this widget.

## MemorySlotWidget {#memoryslotwidget}

**Header:** `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/MemorySlotWidget.hpp`

A self-contained widget for configuring memory (static) input slots. Replaces the
former `StaticInputSlotWidget`, `SequenceSlotWidget`, and `RecurrentBindingWidget`.

### Architecture

Each slot position is configured via `MemoryFrameBinding` in session state. The
widget exposes a **Frame kind** combo (Static / Recurrent) and stacked
`AutoParamWidget` forms backed by `StaticFrameSourceForm` and
`RecurrentFrameSourceForm` from `BindingParamSchemas.hpp`.

```cpp
// Read back bindings for this slot only
std::vector<dl::MemoryFrameBinding> frames = widget.bindings();

// Restore from session state (filters by slot_name)
widget.setBindings(state->memoryFrames());
```

Sequence slots (`sequence_dim >= 0`) support multiple position rows with Add/Remove
controls up to the model sequence length. Single-frame slots use one row.

### Signals

| Signal | Emitted when |
|---|---|
| `bindingChanged()` | Any frame kind, static source, or recurrent parameter changes |

### Typical usage

```cpp
auto * memory = new MemorySlotWidget(slot_descriptor, data_manager,
                                     output_slot_names, this);
layout->addWidget(memory);

connect(memory, &MemorySlotWidget::bindingChanged, this, [&]() {
    _syncBindingsFromUi();
});

memory->setBindings(_state->memoryFrames());
memory->refreshDataSources();
memory->refreshBankEntries(bank_entry_ids);
memory->refreshOutputSlots(output_slot_names);
```

See [Memory Frame Bindings](../DeepLearning/bindings/memory_frames.qmd) for the
core data model.
